REED FAMILY (Southworth)

July 5, 2016


1.WILLIAM READE (1410- )
ANNE FARNLEY (1415- )

WILLIAM READE was born about 1410, of West Berkshire, England, to unknown parents. He married Anne Farnley.

zh.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr.於1587年出生在英國英格蘭肯特麥德斯同。他於1635年10月8日與Avis Chapman在英國薩默塞特朗 塞頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1636年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯且於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世於1658年4月6日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯諾斯 維姆斯 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr.于1587年出生在英国英格兰肯特麥德斯同。他于1635年10月8日与Avis Chapman在英国薩默塞特朗 塞頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1636年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯且于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世于1658年4月6日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯諾斯 維姆斯 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Reede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Reed  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 423, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Reed
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English and Older Scots red(e) ‘red’, no doubt denoting someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion.

English: from Middle English ride, rede, rude (Old English rīed, rēod, rȳd) ‘clearing’. The surname may be topographic for someone who lived in or near a clearing, or habitational, for someone who lived at one of a number of places so named, including Rede Court in Strood (Kent), Rides in Eastchurch (Kent), Ride Way in Ewhurst (Surrey), and Reed Farm in Wadhurst (Sussex). The word is particularly common in the southeastern counties of England, from Kent to the Isle of Wight. See also Rider and Reader .

English: habitational name from Read (Lancashire), Reed (Hertfordshire), or Rede (Suffolk). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe, female roe deer’ + hēafod ‘head’. The Hertfordshire placename derives from Old English rȳhth ‘rough piece of ground’. The etymology of the Suffolk placename is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

en.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr. was born in 1587, in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. He married Avis Chapman on 8 October 1635, in Long Sutton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1636 and Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639. He died before 6 April 1658, in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in North Weymouth Cemetery, Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr. est né en 1587, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Avis Chapman le 8 octobre 1635, à Long Sutton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1636 et à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639. Il est décédé avant 6 avril 1658, à Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à North Weymouth Cemetery, Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr. wurde 1587 in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat am 8. Oktober 1635 in Long Sutton, Somerset, England Avis Chapman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1636 hat er in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1639 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb vor 6. April 1658 in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in North Weymouth Cemetery, Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr. è nato il nel 1587 nel Maidstone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Avis Chapman il 8 ottobre 1635, nel Long Sutton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1636 e nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1639. Morì prima del 6 aprile 1658, nel Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a North Weymouth Cemetery, Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr.は1587年にイギリスイギリスケントメイドストーンで生まれた。1635年10月8日にイギリスソメルセトロング スットオンでAvis Chapmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1636年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエイモウスに，1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに住んでいた。彼は1658年4月6日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクウエイモウスで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクウエイモウスノース ウエイモウス セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr.(은)는 1587년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 메이드스톤에서 태어났다. 그는 1635년 10월 8일 영국 서머세트 론그 수턴에서 Avis Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1636년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 베이모우스에서, 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 살았다. 그는 1658년 4월 6일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 베이모우스에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 베이모우스 노르스 베이모우스 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr. nasceu em 1587, em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Avis Chapman em 8 de outubro de 1635, em Long Sutton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1636 e em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1639. Ele faleceu antes 6 de abril de 1658, em Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em North Weymouth Cemetery, Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: William Reede Sr. родился в 1587 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Avis Chapman 8 октября 1635 г. в местности лонг суттон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности вимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1636 году и в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году. Он умер перед 6 апрель 1658 г. в местности вимоут, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности норт вимоут кеметири, вимоут, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
